objective: Raise non-frontend changed-file coverage toward an 80% per-file threshold by extending or creating focused unit tests.
rules: Work only on the assigned source file and its related test file unless a tiny support change is required for testability.
Prefer extending an existing test file when one already exists.
Do not refactor production code unless required to make the behavior testable.
Target meaningful branch and failure-path coverage, not trivial smoke tests.
If the assigned file has no executable lines or is abstract-only, do not add a trivial test; return a policy-exception recommendation instead.

workers.task: Create or extend tests covering database bootstrap, schema creation, migrations, and failure handling for lib/services/database_helper.dart. Aim to move the file toward at least 80% line coverage.
Create tests for notification lifecycle behavior, update paths, and guard clauses in lib/services/live_workout_notification_service.dart. Use fakes or mocks rather than device integration.
Extend the base DAO test suite to cover shared CRUD helpers, mapping hooks, error propagation, and generic query helpers in lib/services/dao/base_dao.dart.
Add focused DAO tests for lib/services/dao/workout_exercise_dao.dart covering inserts, lookups, joins, ordering, and empty-state behavior.
Expand tests for lib/services/dao/workout_set_dao.dart with persistence, retrieval, sorting, updates, and deletion edge cases.
Add meaningful persistence and query tests for lib/services/dao/workout_dao.dart, including filters, mapping, and failure paths.
Extend the existing workout session tests to cover uncovered branches, resume/reset flows, invalid transitions, and persistence interactions in lib/services/workout_session_service.dart.
Create tests for lib/services/debug_data_service.dart covering happy paths, guard clauses, and generated data shape without depending on UI.
Extend lib/services/dao/exercise_dao.dart tests with search, lookup, mapping, and empty-result scenarios.
Expand tests for lib/services/dao/workout_template_dao.dart to cover CRUD behavior, mapping, ordering, and edge cases.
Create service tests for lib/services/export_import_service.dart that cover export formatting, import validation, failure cases, and malformed input handling.
Extend lib/services/workout_service.dart tests with uncovered branches in creation, history reads, aggregation, and deletion/update flows.
Add DAO tests for lib/services/dao/weight_entry_dao.dart covering inserts, updates, filters, and empty-state behavior.
Extend constant-level tests for lib/constants/app_constants.dart to cover remaining enums, parsing helpers, icon items, and assertion behavior.
Fill uncovered DAO branches in lib/services/dao/muscle_group_dao.dart with a small number of targeted tests.
Fill uncovered CRUD and mapping branches in lib/services/dao/workout_folder_dao.dart.
Create small utility tests for lib/utils/app_logger.dart covering idempotent configuration and log listener setup behavior.
Extend the existing startup service tests to cover remaining branches and failure handling in lib/services/app_startup_service.dart.
Add a few direct model tests for lib/models/muscle_group.dart to cover parsing and fallback branches.
Create simple utility tests for formatting and unit label selection in lib/utils/unit_converter.dart.
Add one or two tests to push lib/services/dao/user_dao.dart over the 80% threshold.
Create a minimal model test for lib/models/weekly_bar_data.dart to exercise its executable line.
Do not create a trivial test. Confirm whether lib/models/typedefs.dart is non-instrumentable typedef-only code and return a policy-exception recommendation for the coverage gate.
Do not create a trivial test. Confirm whether lib/services/insights/insight_data_provider.dart is abstract interface-only code and return a policy-exception recommendation for the coverage gate.
